hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of Red Rose Day, a celebration of love and friendship, Hairspray is a lighthearted and fun film that captures the spirit of the day with its upbeat music and dance numbers, promoting self-acceptance and equality.
hero.blurb: This film is a classic musical comedy with a unique blend of music, dance, and social commentary. With its talented cast, including John Travolta and Queen Latifah, Hairspray is a must-see for anyone looking for a fun and uplifting movie experience.

released.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer is a superhero film that still rules with its action-packed storyline and impressive visual effects, making it a great choice for fans of the genre.
released.blurb: This film is a thrilling superhero adventure that explores the origins of the Silver Surfer and his connection to the planet-eating entity known as Galactus. With its talented cast, including Ioan Gruffudd and Jessica Alba, Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer is a fun and entertaining movie experience.

birthday.title: The Truman Show
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Chris Pratt, born June 12, 1979, but since he wasn't in this movie, let's celebrate with Jim Carrey, who was actually in a great film -  Happy birthday to Jim Carrey's co-star, isn't the point, rather, Happy birthday to the director Peter Weir wasn't born today, however, since the actual birthday person isn't in the suggested movie —  Happy birthday to no one, we instead celebrate this movie because it stars Jim Carrey, in this case, 'The Truman Show', one of his best works which also stars Laura Linney.
birthday.blurb: The Truman Show is a thought-provoking and visually stunning film that explores the themes of reality and free will. With its talented cast, including Jim Carrey and Laura Linney, this movie is a must-see for anyone interested in philosophical and psychological thrillers.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: a famously bad movie with terrible reviews, I Know Who Killed Me is a psychological thriller that has been widely panned by critics and audiences alike, making it a great example of a film that failed to deliver on its promising premise.
awful.blurb: This film is a messy and convoluted thriller that tries to pass off its lack of coherence as profundity. With its cringe-worthy dialogue and poor acting, I Know Who Killed Me is a movie that is so bad it's good, making it a great choice for those who enjoy watching trainwrecks.
